summary: Tested new features: Units CRUD in Settings, Recipe supplier/version fields, Recipe duplicate endpoint, Costs Table with Fournisseur/Version columns. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Units auto-seeded (10 default units).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. Units tab in Settings shows 10 units grouped by type (Poids, Volume, Quantite, Longueur). Recipes page displays as table grouped by supplier with filters (search, supplier, version). Duplicate creates versioned copy (v2, v3, etc). Costs Table shows Fournisseur and Ver. columns.

units_api.POST /api/units: PASS - Admin can create new unit

recipe_supplier_version.POST /api/recipes with supplier: PASS - Creates recipe with supplier_id, supplier_name, version

recipe_duplicate.POST /api/recipes/{id}/duplicate: PASS - Creates copy with incremented version

reports_all_costs.GET /api/reports/all-costs: PASS - Includes supplier_name and version fields

settings_units_tab.tab_visible: PASS - Units tab (Unites) visible in Settings
settings_units_tab.units_grouped_by_type: PASS - Poids, Volume, Quantite, Longueur groups
settings_units_tab.edit_delete_buttons: PASS - Edit/delete icons on each unit

recipe_dialog.unit_selector: PASS - Shows 10 dynamic units from API

costs_table.version_column: PASS - Ver. column with v1 badges
